title: Dracenia
description: Dracenia is a dark-fantasy modpack built around Vampirism, Werewolves, and Ice and Fire. Choose a supernatural path, face dragons and legendary beasts, and survive a hostile world where power is earned through risk and mastery.
body:
Dracenia is a dark-fantasy modpack centered on supernatural power, choice, and survival. Its core gameplay revolves around Vampirism, Werewolves, and Ice and Fire, creating a world where ancient curses and mythic beasts define progression.

Players can evolve into Vampires or Werewolves, each path offering unique abilities, strengths, and limitations that fundamentally change how the game is played. These transformations introduce meaningful risk-reward mechanics, forcing players to adapt to environmental threats, combat challenges, and their own weaknesses.

The world of Dracenia is hostile and untamed. Dragons, sea serpents, and legendary creatures dominate the land, air, and sea, turning exploration into a high-stakes endeavor. Advancement is earned through preparation, strategy, and mastery of your chosen power.

Dracenia focuses on:

Dark fantasy survival and progression

Supernatural transformations with lasting consequences

Dangerous exploration and powerful enemies

A world built to challenge, not protect, the player

Power defines survival in Dracenia—and only the strongest endure.
